goal: Write a TypeScript function fizzbuzz(n: number): string[] that returns FizzBuzz output from 1 to n. Include the function and a brief test.
criteria: Must be valid TypeScript, handle the classic FizzBuzz rules, include at least one test case.

goal: Implement a debounce<T extends (...args: any[]) => any>(fn: T, ms: number): T function in TypeScript with proper types.
criteria: Must be TypeScript with generics, correct debounce semantics (delays execution, cancels prior call), no external dependencies.

goal: Write a binary search function in TypeScript: binarySearch<T>(arr: T[], target: T, compare: (a: T, b: T) => number): number. Returns index or -1.
criteria: Generic, uses compare function correctly, returns -1 when not found, O(log n) complexity.
